name: lab-results-panel
title: Lab Results Panel
description: Recent labs with in-row trends plus any pending orders. Composes WidgetPanel + LabTrendRow + LabOrderStatus.

props.name: results
props.description: Resulted labs with value, reference range, and history.

props.name: pendingOrders
props.description: In-flight orders shown below the results.

clinicalNotes: Always pair each value with its reference range and an in-row trend — a single lab number is uninterpretable without its range and direction of travel, which is why the panel uses LabTrendRow (value + range bar + sparkline) rather than bare numbers. Separating resulted values from pending orders prevents the classic error of assuming a result is final when the sample is still in the lab. Critical flags carry through from LabTrendRow.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Patient Chart block (B-1).
